message.content:
@startuml
title **Omit Representation**

actor Client as client

participant "\u21c4 Representation" as rep

client -> rep : PUT / POST / PATCH
note right of rep #lightblue
**Header**  **Value**
Prefer    return=minimal
end note

rep --> client : 204 No Content / 201 Created
note left of client #lightgreen
**Header**              **Value**
Preference-Applied  return=minimal
end note

note right of rep #lightgrey
\u21c4 Representation
end note

@enduml
